objective: Create Demo Checkpoint 1 PR5 as the hosted-demo access, quota, retention, and reviewer-facing polish layer after merged PR #242 / issue #241. Positive claims: local/dev/test/CI remain mock/local and require no hosted credentials, provider keys, paid services, public URLs, or real provider calls; hosted-demo behavior is represented only behind explicit disabled/default-safe configuration and fake/local tests; demo access is denied by default and bounded by invite/session state; quota reservation, refund/rollback, idempotency, duplicate-use/spend prevention, retry/timeout, abuse-rate limiting, and redacted observability are enforced before side effects; retention/deletion/tombstone evidence is recorded for demo artifacts and access records with fake/local provider-side deletion evidence only; reviewer-facing artifact metadata, disabled-provider posture, synthetic-media disclosure, error states, and source/eval/media/access/quota/retention bindings are visible. Negative invariants: no hosted deployment, public URL exposure, provider account setup, dashboard configuration, paid plan activation, wallet funding, paid spend, production-readiness claim, real provider call, cloned voice, cloned face/avatar, Digital Twin, replica-profile creation, real-person likeness, Product Mode 2, or Checkpoint 2 work is authorized.

real avatar or video generation without explicit written owner approval
